info.text: Progress came in fits and starts.

info.text: Progress comes one step at a time.

info.text: Progress can be a tango, or progress can be a waltz.

info.text: If you don't move forward, you'll fall behind.

info.text: If you don't move forward, you'll fall behind.

info.text: Progress is a dance where you may lead, but your followers must choose to follow.

info.text: Progress can be a tango, with some awkward moves in between.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Progress is an art form, where the dancers aren't always in sync.
